name: wushen-forge
description: Local-first AI modular 3D design workbench with a Weapon Concept Pack.

scripts.assets:module-pack-gate: npm run assets:reference-pack:check && npm run agent:r3-module-pack-smoke

scripts.m2:gate: npm run contracts:check && npm run agent:check && npm run agent:m2-smoke && npm run desktop:typecheck && npm run desktop:build

scripts.m6:gate: npm run contracts:check && npm run contracts:types:check && npm run agent:check && npm run agent:m6-structure-recast-smoke && npm run desktop:typecheck
scripts.r1:create-weapon-gate: npm run agent:r1-foundation-smoke && npm run agent:m2-smoke && npm run agent:m3-llm-smoke && npm run agent:m3-comfyui-smoke && npm run agent:m5-glb-smoke
scripts.r1:generate3d-gate: npm run agent:r1-foundation-smoke && npm run agent:m5-generate3d-http-smoke && npm run agent:p0-async-generate3d-worker-smoke && npm run agent:p0-provider-runtime-boundary-smoke && npm run agent:p0-generate3d-worker-loop-smoke && npm run agent:p0-local-http-3d-provider-smoke && npm run agent:p0-local-3d-runtime-wrapper-smoke

scripts.r1:patch-gate: npm run agent:r1-foundation-smoke && npm run agent:m4-migrations-smoke && npm run agent:m4-patch-smoke && npm run agent:m4-patch-http-smoke && npm run agent:m4-comfyui-patch-smoke
scripts.r1:foundation-gate: npm run r1:create-weapon-gate && npm run r1:generate3d-gate && npm run r1:worker-gate && npm run r1:unity-export-gate && npm run r1:patch-gate && npm run m6:gate
